label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this problem. So, there are five friends: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a specific book. Then there are a series of swaps between them, and I need to track who ends up with which book, particularly focusing on what Dave has at the end. First, I need to list out the initial books each person has: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: Ulysses - Claire: The Fellowship of the Ring - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each swap step by step and keep track of the books. First swap: Claire and Bob swap books. So, after this swap: - Claire now has Ulysses (previously Bob's) - Bob now has The Fellowship of the Ring (previously Claire's) - The others remain the same: - Alice: Moby Dick - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 Second swap: Claire and Dave swap books. So now, Claire has Dave's previous book, and Dave has Claire's previous book. Before this swap: - Claire has Ulysses - Dave has Lolita After swap: - Claire now has Lolita - Dave now has Ulysses Others: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: The
